prestazioni: Engine: CDUD (3.0 TDI V6) - Stage 2+ ECU remap by Dimsport Genius with custom dyno-tuned fueling maps for 380hp and 800Nm torque, utilizing a 3.5bar Bosch CP4.2 high-pressure fuel pump and upgraded 800cc Siemens Deka injectors (PN: 0280158160) for precise diesel delivery at 2200 bar rail pressure.

Forced Induction: Garrett GTB2260VK turbocharger (hybrid upgrade with billet compressor wheel, 60mm inducer, 84mm exducer, and 0.82 A/R turbine housing) paired with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe featuring a 200-cell catalytic converter (HJS 200/13) and Vibrant 1799 resonated muffler for optimized backpressure reduction.

Suspension & Handling: KW Suspensions Clubsport coilovers (3-way adjustable, 80mm stroke, 10kg/mm front springs, 12kg/mm rear springs) with Audi-specific top mounts (KW PN: 35241001) and polybushings (Powerflex Black Series, PN: PFR8-1001 for front control arms, PFR8-1002 for rear subframe). Front sway bar upgraded to H&R 25mm adjustable (PN: 523 250 00) and rear sway bar to 22mm (H&R PN: 523 220 00) for reduced body roll.
estetica: Exterior: Rotiform LAS-R 10.5x20 ET35 forged wheels (matte bronze finish) with 275/35 R20 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires, paired with a full carbon fiber widebody kit by Prior Design (PD-A6ALL1) including extended fenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser with integrated tow hook cover. Front bumper lip replaced with a 3D-printed ABS unit from 3D Design Japan (PN: 3D-AD-A6ALL-FL) for aggressive aero balance.

Lighting: Full LED retrofit with Osram Night Breaker Laser H7 bulbs (64210NL-HCB) for high beams and Philips Ultinon Pro9000 H11 (11361UPPPS2) for fog lights. Rear taillights upgraded to Audi OEM RS6-style LED units (PN: 4G0945095/096) with sequential turn signals, and front grille fitted with a custom laser-cut stainless steel mesh (0.8mm gauge, 3mm aperture) by Meshworx (PN: MW-A6-30TDIGRILLE).

Interior: Recaro Sportster CS front seats (Audi-specific mounting brackets, PN: 3D0881015A) upholstered in Nappa leather with Alcantara inserts (color: Tango Red/Black, by Katzkin). Rear seats replaced with a custom-fabricated flat-folding cargo platform (aluminum honeycomb core, carbon fiber veneer) by Status Gruppe, featuring integrated 12V outlets and a retractable cargo net (PN: SG-A6ALL-CARGO). Steering wheel swapped for a 360mm MOMO Mod.70 (suede, flat-bottom) with integrated quick-release hub (NRG PN: 502-110-10).
